  "findings": [
    "The title block, revision, and matching callout are not visible on the cropped sheet excerpt.",
    "The installed welding condition cannot be verified against the approved, controlling engineering drawing."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Request the complete, uncropped, and approved IFC (Issued for Construction) drawing containing the title block, revision history, and specific weld callouts.",
    "Verify that the weld matches the correct revision of the engineering drawings before final sign-off."
  ],
  "rationale": "Although the physical welding has reached the inspection stage, a final compliance decision cannot be made because the cropped drawing excerpt lacks the title block, revision number, and specific callout needed to verify that the installed work matches the approved engineering design.",

    "AWS D1.1",
    "AISC Code of Standard Practice"
  ]
}
